request.description: Implement Forge Phase 2: Debate Rooms with AI fact-check, immutable verdicts, realtime messaging
request.prdContent:
# Requirements Document

## 1. Application Overview

### 1.1 Application Name
Forge (formerly Catbot)

### 1.2 Application Description
A multi-persona AI chat platform with debate rooms. Users can build customizable AI personas, share them publicly, and engage in conversations. Phase 2 adds real-time debate rooms where multiple users can chat, fact-check messages with AI, and receive immutable verdicts with cited sources. Built on React + TypeScript + Supabase stack.

## 2. Users & Usage Scenarios

### 2.1 Target Users
- Users wanting to create and customize AI personas with specific personalities
- Users seeking to share AI personas publicly without requiring recipients to have accounts
- Users needing organized conversation management with search capabilities
- Users preferring streamlined persona selection during chat sessions
- Users wanting to participate in real-time group debates with AI fact-checking
- Anonymous users joining debate rooms without accounts

### 2.2 Core Usage Scenarios
- Creating AI personas with customizable traits and behaviors
- Sharing persona links for public access without authentication
- Searching through conversation history quickly
- Switching between different personas during chat
- Managing multiple personas with edit/delete capabilities
- Creating debate rooms with specific topics and access controls
- Joining debate rooms anonymously or with display names
- Fact-checking messages in real-time with AI-powered verdicts
- Sharing immutable fact-check verdicts

## 3. Page Structure & Functionality

```
Forge (Multi-Persona AI Chat Platform)
├── Home/Landing Page (/)
│   ├── Welcome Screen (empty state)
│   ├── Prompt Suggestions
│   └── Active Rooms List (sidebar)
├── Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId)
│   ├── Conversation Sidebar with Search
│   ├── Chat View
│   ├── Model Selector
│   ├── Persona Quick-Select
│   └── Chat Input Area
├── Persona Management
│   ├── Persona List Page (/personas)
│   ├── Persona Creation Page (/personas/create)
│   └── Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId)
├── Debate Rooms
│   ├── Rooms List Page (/rooms)
│   ├── Room Creation Page (/rooms/create)
│   └── Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId)
└── Settings Page (/settings)
```

### 3.1 Home/Landing Page (/)
**Purpose:** Welcome screen and navigation hub

**Core Functions:**
- Display app name \"Forge\" prominently
- Show subtitle: \"Build AI personas. Share them. Debate with them.\"
- Present 3 feature cards:
  - \"Create Personas\"
  - \"Chat with AI\"
  - \"Debate Rooms\"
- Display existing prompt suggestions below feature cards
- Show \"Join Room\" quick-action button
- Serve as empty state when no conversation is active

**Sidebar Enhancements:**
- Add \"Rooms\" section below conversations
- Display active rooms user has joined
- Show room topic and participant count for each room
- Provide quick access to join room by code

### 3.2 Chat Interface (/chat/:conversationId)
**Purpose:** Main conversation area with enhanced persona integration

**Core Functions:**
- Display chat messages in existing upgraded UI
- Send text messages to AI models
- Access model selector (existing functionality)
- Use persona quick-select to set system prompt
- Show active persona name near model selector
- Maintain existing image input/output capabilities
- Support existing multi-model features

**Conversation Sidebar with Search:**
- Search input at top of sidebar
- Real-time filter of conversation list by title as user types
- Clear button to reset search
- Empty state message when no results match search query
- Display filtered conversation list below search

**Persona Quick-Select:**
- Small \"Persona\" button/indicator in chat input area
- Click to open popover showing user's created personas
- Select persona to set as system prompt for current conversation
- Display active persona name near model selector
- Persona selection applies to current conversation only

### 3.3 Persona Creation Page (/personas/create)
**Purpose:** Full persona builder interface

**Core Functions:**
- Input persona name (text field)
- Select avatar (emoji picker or image upload)
- Enter personality description (free text area)
- Choose tone from dropdown: Friendly / Professional / Blunt / Playful / Socratic
- Specify knowledge domain (free text area)
- Toggle memory behavior (remembers across sessions or not)
- Save persona to Supabase personas table
- Navigate back to persona list after successful save

**Persona Fields:**
- Name: required text input
- Avatar: emoji picker or upload option
- Personality description: multi-line text area
- Tone: dropdown with 5 options
- Knowledge domain: free text area
- Memory behavior: toggle switch

### 3.4 Persona List Page (/personas)
**Purpose:** Manage all user-created personas

**Core Functions:**
- Display all personas created by current user
- Show persona name, avatar, and brief description for each
- Edit button for each persona (navigates to edit mode of creation page)
- Delete button for each persona (with confirmation)
- Create new persona button (navigates to /personas/create)
- Display shareable public link for each persona
- Copy link button for easy sharing

### 3.5 Public Persona Page (/p/:personaId)
**Purpose:** Public access point for shared personas

**Core Functions:**
- Display persona name and avatar
- Show persona description and traits
- Provide immediate chat interface
- Allow anyone to chat without account or API key
- Use creator's credits from existing API key pool
- Maintain conversation within session (no persistence for anonymous users)
- Display persona tone and knowledge domain

### 3.6 Rooms List Page (/rooms)
**Purpose:** Browse and manage debate rooms

**Core Functions:**
- Display all available rooms
- Show room cards with: topic, participant count, join code, room type indicator
- \"Create New Room\" button (navigates to /rooms/create)
- \"Join Room\" button with code input field
- Filter rooms by type: Public / Semi-private / Private
- Display rooms user has joined prominently

### 3.7 Room Creation Page (/rooms/create)
**Purpose:** Create new debate room with configuration

**Core Functions:**
- Input room topic/title (required text field)
- Enter room description (optional text area)
- Select room type from dropdown:
  - Private (invite only)
  - Semi-private (invite link)
  - Public (anyone with code joins)
- Input creator display name (required text field)
- Option to add AI persona to room (dropdown of user's created personas)
- Generate unique 6-character join code automatically
- Generate shareable invite link: /room/:roomId
- Save room to Supabase groups table
- Navigate to room chat page after successful creation

### 3.8 Room Chat Page (/room/:groupId)
**Purpose:** Real-time group debate with AI fact-checking

**Core Functions:**

**Join Flow:**
- Prompt for display name on first access
- \"Stay Anonymous\" option (generates session ID)
- Anonymous users display as \"Anonymous\" + last 4 chars of session ID
- No account required to join

**Room Header:**
- Display room topic
- Show participant count
- Display join code with copy button
- Invite link button (copies /room/:roomId to clipboard)

**Real-time Messaging:**
- Display all messages in real-time using Supabase Realtime
- Each message shows: sender name, timestamp, message content
- Messages from AI persona show persona avatar
- Text input area for sending messages
- Messages appear immediately for all participants

**Fact-Check System:**
- \"Fact Check\" button appears on hover over any message
- Click triggers AI search on message content + room topic context
- Thinking/loading state displays while processing
- Verdict card appears inline below fact-checked message
- Verdict card shows:
  - AI verdict text
  - Verdict status badge: \"Verified ✓\" / \"Disputed ✗\" / \"Unverifiable —\"
  - Sources/citations as clickable links
  - Timestamp
  - LOCKED badge (immutable indicator)
- \"Share Verdict\" button on each verdict card (copies summary to clipboard)
- Verdicts have distinctive locked/sealed visual style
- No edit or delete options on verdict cards

**Toast Notifications:**
- New message received
- Fact-check complete
- User joined/left room

### 3.9 Join Room by Code Flow
**Purpose:** Quick access to rooms via 6-character code

**Core Functions:**
- \"Join Room\" button on home page
- Modal with 6-character code input field
- Validate code and navigate to /room/:roomId
- Trigger join flow (display name prompt)

### 3.10 Settings Page (/settings)
**Purpose:** Existing settings management (no changes)

## 4. Business Rules & Logic

### 4.1 App Rebranding
- App name changes from \"Catbot\" to \"Forge\" across all UI elements
- Update sidebar header, page titles, empty states, and all branding references
- Tagline: \"Build AI personas. Share them. Debate with them.\"

### 4.2 Persona Creation & Storage
- Personas saved to existing Supabase personas table
- Table columns: id, name, description, avatar, personality_traits, system_prompt
- Each persona belongs to creating user
- Persona data persists across sessions
- System prompt generated from personality description, tone, and knowledge domain

### 4.3 Public Persona Sharing
- Each persona gets unique shareable link: /p/:personaId
- Public links accessible without authentication
- Anonymous users can chat immediately
- Conversations use creator's API credits
- No conversation history saved for anonymous users
- Creator's API key pool handles all requests

### 4.4 Conversation Search
- Search filters conversation list in real-time
- Matching based on conversation title
- Case-insensitive search
- Clear button resets to full list
- Empty state when no matches found

### 4.5 Persona Quick-Select in Chat
- Persona selection sets system prompt for current conversation
- Active persona displayed near model selector
- User can change persona mid-conversation
- Persona selection persists for conversation duration
- Selecting different persona updates system prompt immediately

### 4.6 Memory Behavior
- Memory toggle in persona creation controls cross-session memory
- Enabled: persona remembers previous conversations
- Disabled: each conversation starts fresh
- Memory stored in existing memories table
- Memory behavior applies to all conversations using that persona

### 4.7 Room Creation & Access Control
- Each room gets unique 6-character join code (auto-generated)
- Room types determine access:
  - Private: only invited users can join
  - Semi-private: anyone with invite link can join
  - Public: anyone with join code can join
- Shareable invite link format: /room/:roomId
- Creator can add one AI persona to room as participant
- AI persona messages use persona's system prompt and avatar

### 4.8 Anonymous Join & Identity
- No authentication required to join rooms
- Users choose display name or stay anonymous on join
- Anonymous users get random session ID stored in sessionStorage
- Display format: \"Anonymous\" + last 4 chars of session ID
- Session ID persists within browser session only

### 4.9 Real-time Messaging
- Messages use Supabase Realtime for instant delivery
- Messages stored in messages table with: group_id, sender_name, sender_session_id, is_anonymous, is_ai, message_content, timestamp
- All participants see messages immediately
- AI persona messages triggered by room context (if persona added to room)

### 4.10 AI Fact-Check System
- Uses existing AI Search edge function (Gemini 2.5 Flash + Google grounding)
- Fact-check request includes:
  - Flagged message content
  - Room topic
  - Last 5 messages for context
- AI response provides:
  - Verdict summary text
  - Source URLs (grounding chunks)
  - Verdict status determined by AI response content
- Verdict stored in verdicts table: id, group_id, message_id, verdict_text, verdict_status, sources (jsonb array), created_at
- Verdicts are immutable: no updated_at column, no delete policy, no edit capability
- Sources displayed as clickable links with titles
- Verdict status options: \"Verified ✓\" / \"Disputed ✗\" / \"Unverifiable —\"

### 4.11 Verdict Immutability
- Verdicts locked with timestamp on creation
- No edit or delete functionality for verdicts
- LOCKED badge displayed on all verdict cards
- Verdicts persist permanently in database
- Share verdict copies summary + sources to clipboard

### 4.12 Existing Functionality Preserved
- Multi-model support continues working
- API key management unchanged
- Image generation and input capabilities maintained
- All existing services (chat.service.ts, apikey.service.ts, group.service.ts, persona.service.ts) continue operating

## 5. Exception & Boundary Cases

| Scenario | Handling |
|----------|----------|
| Persona creation with missing required fields | Display validation error, prevent save until corrected |
| Persona save fails to Supabase | Show error message, allow retry |
| Public persona link accessed but persona deleted | Display \"Persona not found\" message |
| Anonymous user on public persona page, creator has no API credits | Show error message indicating service unavailable |
| Search query returns no matching conversations | Display empty state message: \"No conversations match your search\" |
| User attempts to delete persona currently in use | Show confirmation warning, allow deletion, clear persona from active conversations |
| Persona quick-select popover opened with no personas created | Display message: \"No personas yet. Create one to get started.\" with link to /personas/create |
| Avatar upload fails | Show upload error, allow retry or switch to emoji picker |
| DOM nesting warning from nested buttons | Fix by restructuring SidebarContent conversation items to avoid button-in-button |
| Persona edit page accessed with invalid personaId | Redirect to persona list page |
| Memory toggle changed for persona with existing conversations | Apply new memory behavior to future conversations only |
| Room creation with missing required fields | Display validation error, prevent creation until corrected |
| Invalid join code entered | Show error message: \"Invalid room code\" |
| User attempts to join private room without invite | Display access denied message |
| Room accessed with invalid roomId | Display \"Room not found\" message |
| Fact-check triggered while previous fact-check processing | Queue request or show \"Please wait\" message |
| AI fact-check fails or times out | Display error message, allow retry |
| Anonymous user loses session (browser refresh) | Generate new session ID, treat as new anonymous user |
| AI persona added to room but persona deleted | Display error in room, disable AI participant |
| Multiple users fact-check same message simultaneously | Each generates separate verdict card |
| Verdict sources contain invalid URLs | Display source text without clickable link |
| Room with no participants | Room remains active, can be rejoined |
| User attempts to edit or delete verdict | No UI controls available, action impossible |
| Realtime connection lost | Show reconnection indicator, attempt auto-reconnect |

## 6. Acceptance Criteria

1. App displays \"Forge\" as name in all UI locations
2. Home page shows welcome screen with tagline and 3 feature cards
3. Sidebar displays \"Rooms\" section with active rooms list
4. User can navigate to /rooms and see all available rooms
5. User can create room with topic, description, room type, and display name
6. Room creation generates unique 6-character join code automatically
7. Room creation generates shareable invite link /room/:roomId
8. User can add AI persona to room during creation
9. User can join room via invite link without authentication
10. Join flow prompts for display name or \"Stay Anonymous\" option
11. Anonymous users display as \"Anonymous\" + last 4 chars of session ID
12. Room chat displays all messages in real-time using Supabase Realtime
13. Messages show sender name, timestamp, and content
14. AI persona messages display with persona avatar
15. \"Fact Check\" button appears on hover over any message
16. Clicking \"Fact Check\" triggers AI search with loading state
17. Verdict card appears inline below fact-checked message
18. Verdict card shows verdict text, status badge, sources, timestamp, and LOCKED badge
19. Verdict sources display as clickable links
20. \"Share Verdict\" button copies summary to clipboard
21. Verdicts have no edit or delete controls
22. Room header shows topic, participant count, join code with copy button, and invite link button
23. Toast notifications appear for new messages, fact-check completion, and user join/left events
24. User can join room by entering 6-character code from home page
25. All Phase 1 features (personas, conversation search, persona quick-select, public persona pages) continue working
26. Verdict status displays as \"Verified ✓\", \"Disputed ✗\", or \"Unverifiable —\" based on AI response
27. Room types (Private/Semi-private/Public) control access correctly
28. Messages table stores group_id, sender_name, sender_session_id, is_anonymous, is_ai columns
29. Verdicts table stores id, group_id, message_id, verdict_text, verdict_status, sources, created_at (no updated_at)
30. Groups table includes room_type, topic, invite_link_enabled columns

## 7. Out of Scope for Current Release

- User authentication system
- Persona marketplace or discovery features
- Persona versioning or history
- Advanced persona analytics
- Persona collaboration or co-editing
- Conversation export for anonymous users on public pages
- Persona templates or presets
- Advanced memory configuration beyond toggle
- Persona categories or tags
- Social features (likes, comments, ratings for personas)
- Persona usage statistics
- API rate limiting per persona
- Custom domain support for public persona links
- Persona access controls beyond public/private
- Multi-language support for persona descriptions
- Room moderation tools (kick, ban, mute)
- Room history or archive functionality
- Verdict voting or community validation
- Advanced room settings (max participants, time limits)
- Room categories or tags
- Private messaging within rooms
- Room analytics or statistics
- Verdict editing or appeals process
- Fact-check request limits or throttling
- Room search functionality
- Notification preferences for room activity
- Room bookmarking or favorites
- Transcript export for rooms
- Video or voice chat in rooms
- Screen sharing in rooms
- Polls or voting in rooms
- File sharing in rooms
- Room themes or customization

content.text: {"versionDesc":"Implement Forge Phase 2: Debate Rooms with AI fact-check, immutable verdicts, realtime messaging","versionId":"app_version-byuzs5f7mpz4","versionLabel":"v14"}
